message:
test(codec): add roundtrip tests for floating pane PDU types [ft-2dd4s.2]

Add encode/decode roundtrip tests for all 5 new floating pane PDUs:
CreateFloatingPane, MoveFloatingPane, SetFloatingPaneZ,
ToggleFloatingPane, RemoveFloatingPane. Also verify pdu_name().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
